delivery.evidence: No external data imported; all calculations reference embedded packet only.

required_outputs.notes: OpenXML workbook containing embedded packet values, formulas, triage metrics, validation checks, sensitivity checks, and action package decision table with pass/warn/fail/needs_review logic.
